description_long: This is a single casual sneaker, primarily light gray in color, with a low-top design and a rounded toe. The upper is made of a combination of suede and synthetic materials, featuring subtle stitched detailing and a metallic gray side stripe. The shoe has a padded collar and tongue, with visible mesh lining for comfort and breathability. The lacing system uses metal eyelets and standard gray laces, and the tongue displays a fabric label with the brand 'AUB & CO' in black text. The sole is off-white with a slightly textured finish, showing some signs of wear and dirt, and the interior is stuffed with white paper for shape retention.
description: A light gray casual sneaker with suede and synthetic materials, metallic side stripe, and off-white sole. Features include a padded collar, mesh lining, and 'AUB & CO' branding on the tongue.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the rounded toe, lacing system, metallic side stripe, and 'AUB & CO' label on the tongue.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the padded heel, off-white sole, and subtle stitching on the back.
description_view_2: Left side view displaying the smooth suede upper, metallic side stripe, and mesh collar.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the lacing system, tongue label, and overall shoe symmetry.
attribute_logo: Rectangular fabric label on the tongue with 'AUB & CO' in black text
